sentences.arabic: بَدَأَتِ المَدَارِسُ فِي اسْتِخْدَامِ الذَّكَاءِ الِاصْطِنَاعِيِّ لِمُسَاعَدَةِ الطُّلَّابِ.
sentences.translation: Škole su počele koristiti vještačku inteligenciju kako bi pomogle učenicima.
sentences.translationEn: Schools have started using artificial intelligence to help students.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ هَذَا النِّظَامُ الجَدِيدُ فِي تَحْسِينِ مَهَارَاتِ القِرَاءَةِ وَالكِتَابَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj novi sistem pomaže u poboljšanju vještina čitanja i pisanja.
sentences.translationEn: This new system helps improve reading and writing skills.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ المُعَلِّمُونَ إِنَّ التِّكْنُولُوجْيَا تُوَفِّرُ وَقْتًا كَبِيرًا لَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnici kažu da im tehnologija štedi mnogo vremena.
sentences.translationEn: Teachers say that technology saves them a lot of time.

sentences.arabic: سَيَكُونُ لِكُلِّ طَالِبٍ بَرْنَامَجٌ خَاصٌّ يُنَاسِبُ مُسْتَوَاهُ الدِّرَاسِيَّ.
sentences.translation: Svaki učenik će imati poseban program koji odgovara njegovom nivou obrazovanja.
sentences.translationEn: Each student will have a specific program that suits their educational level.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمَنَّى الجَمِيعُ أَنْ تَنْجَحَ هَذِهِ التَّجْرِبَةُ فِي المُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Svi se nadaju da će ovaj eksperiment uspjeti u budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone hopes that this experiment will succeed in the future.
